Name: Ransom Everglades School
Tagline: Located in Coconut Grove, Florida, Ransom Everglades School is the best college prep day school for grades 6-12 in Miami and among the top 10 private schools in North America.
About: Ransom Everglades School, founded in 1903, is a prestigious independent day school in Coconut Grove, Florida, dedicated to fostering intellectual curiosity and leadership in students aged 11–18. Its rigorous academic program and emphasis on community service distinguish it as a top college preparatory institution.
Philosophy: Ransom Everglades School emphasizes experiential learning and critical thinking, encouraging students to engage deeply with their studies and the world around them. The school fosters a collaborative environment where students are challenged to innovate and lead.
Outcomes: Graduates of Ransom Everglades School consistently gain admission to top-tier universities, including Ivy League institutions. The school boasts numerous accolades in academic competitions, arts, and athletics, reflecting its commitment to excellence and holistic development.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply to Ransom Everglades School through an online application process, typically starting in the fall. Requirements include academic records, teacher recommendations, and standardized test scores, with interviews and campus visits encouraged to ensure a good fit.
Quote: Cultivate curiosity, embrace diversity, and empower each other to lead with integrity and compassion.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Ransom Everglades School's faculty includes experts with advanced degrees and certifications in their fields, ensuring high-level instruction. Many teachers have extensive experience in innovative teaching methods and subject-specific specializations.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers a comprehensive advisory program and on-campus counseling services to support student wellbeing. Regular community-building activities foster a supportive and inclusive environment for all students.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum includes Advanced Placement courses and interdisciplinary projects that promote critical thinking. Experiential learning opportunities, such as field studies and research projects, are integral to the academic experience.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently matriculate to prestigious universities such as Harvard, Yale, and Stanford. The school has a strong record in national academic competitions, reflecting its commitment to excellence.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus boasts state-of-the-art science labs, a modern performing arts center, and athletic facilities including a pool and multiple sports fields. These resources support a wide range of student activities and programs.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Ransom Everglades School employs a robust assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences. Continuous feedback mechanisms ensure students receive personalized guidance to achieve their academic goals.

Name: Gulliver Schools
Tagline: Gulliver Prep in Miami, Florida is an co-educational, private day school with innovative education for students in grades PK-12.
About: At Gulliver, success is equal parts what you achieve and who you become. With future-ready learning, personal discovery, and the energy of Miami all around them, students forge their own path — and shape what comes next.
Philosophy: Gulliver Schools emphasizes a student-centered approach, fostering critical thinking and creativity. The curriculum integrates technology and real-world experiences to prepare students for future challenges.
Outcomes: Gulliver Schools boasts a high rate of college acceptance, with graduates attending prestigious universities worldwide. Students regularly achieve top honors in academic and athletic competitions, reflecting the school's commitment to excellence.
Admissions: Prospective families can apply online through the Gulliver Schools website. The admissions process includes submitting transcripts, recommendations, and standardized test scores, with applications typically due in early winter for the following academic year.
Quote: Empowered by discovery and the spirit of Miami, students at Gulliver shape their own future success.

Performance.Academic Integration: At Gulliver, academic excellence is both rigorous and relevant. Students engage in advanced coursework, signature programs, and hands-on learning designed to deepen understanding and expand possibility.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Gulliver Schools employs highly qualified educators, many holding advanced degrees and certifications in their fields, with expertise in STEM, arts, and humanities. Coaches are often former collegiate athletes with specialized training certifications.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Gulliver Schools offers comprehensive counseling services and a robust advisory program to support student mental health and personal growth. Peer mentorship and community-building activities foster a nurturing and inclusive environment.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Gulliver Schools are frequently accepted into top-tier universities such as Harvard, Stanford, and MIT. Students excel in national academic competitions, including Science Olympiad and MathCounts, showcasing their academic prowess.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Gulliver Schools campus features state-of-the-art science labs, a professional-grade theater, and Olympic-sized swimming pools. Athletic facilities include multiple sports fields, tennis courts, and a fully equipped fitness center.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Gulliver Schools utilizes a comprehensive digital platform for tracking student progress, providing regular updates and feedback to parents. Detailed progress reports and parent-teacher conferences ensure continuous communication and assessment.

Name: Polo Training Foundation
Tagline: Since 1967, teaching youth confidence, discipline, hard work, & leadership through the sport of polo. Donate What We Do PTF Academic ScholarshipsEstablished in 2010 the scholarship program provides co
About: The need to create an equal opportunity base for polo in America led to the development of The Polo Training Foundation. It was officially launched on January 20, 1967.
Philosophy: The Polo Training Foundation emphasizes the development of character and leadership through the sport of polo, fostering a sense of discipline and teamwork. It aims to provide equal opportunities for youth to engage in this prestigious sport.
Outcomes: Graduates of the Polo Training Foundation often excel in national and international polo competitions, showcasing their skills and sportsmanship. Many alumni have pursued higher education and careers in sports management and equestrian fields.
Admissions: Prospective participants can apply online through the Polo Training Foundation's website, with applications typically reviewed on a rolling basis. Requirements include a passion for polo, a commitment to learning, and parental consent for minors.

Name: IMG Academy
Tagline: The training you do outside of practice and competition is just as critical to your overall development. IMG Academy performance camps address total development of the body and mind through training i

Beginning in high school, counselors meet with student-athletes to ensure they are enrolled in the appropriate courses to align with their future academic and athletic aspirations, remain on track for graduation and NCAA eligibility, and begin receiving guidance for the college admissions process that builds throughout their high school journey.

Submit your online application to get started today.
